name: taskloop
description: Unattended task completion loop with VCS and task-source adapters, plus backlog task planning.

interface.shortDescription: Run task backlog items through branch, PR, review, merge, and repeat.
interface.longDescription: Task Loop gives Codex skills for an unattended branch -> implement -> push -> PR -> automated review -> rework -> merge -> next-task workflow, plus a planning skill that turns goals or specs into backlog tasks. It supports docs/planning, Jira, Asana, Monday.com, and Linear task sources, and GitHub, Azure DevOps, and GitLab VCS hosts.
defaultPrompt: Plan taskloop items for this spec.
